OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Josh Klipp, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 473 Ellis, LP is present, represented by Fahad Khwaja.
Attorney Julia M. Adams for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ivor Raja Ram is present.
Attorney Bao-Tran Dang appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of September 18, 2017 is vacated.
